'''Thyferra: Bacta Basics''' was a series of articles written for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' web feature on [[Wizards.com]]. It was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published in [[November]] [[2003]], detailing the planet [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: The Thriving Season===
''…a freelance corporate [[Spy/Legends|spy]] turns triple-agent on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], heart of the [[Bacta Cartel/Legends|Bacta Cartel]].''<ref name="Thyferra" />

===Part 2: Ashern to Ashern===
''…the [[Bloodletter]] takes on a partner, a [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] with rebellious connections.''<ref name="Thyferra" />

===Part 3: Fields of Dreams===
''…our corporate spy hero inspects the [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] fields of Thyferra and receives a rude surprise.''<ref name="Thyferra" />

===Part 4: The Kolcta Generation===
''…the Vratix secret is revealed, and the Bloodletter's objective laid bare.''<ref name="Thyferra" />
